title: polygala serpentaria
intro: Polygala serpentaria, also known as snake root, is a perennial herb belonging to the Polygalaceae family, native to North America and valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Polygala serpentaria include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help reduce stress, improve immune function, and support cardiovascular health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
